text: Extract all the text from the image.
tables: Identify and extract any tables, including column headers, rows, and individual cell data.
workflow: Detect and extract any workflow diagrams, flowcharts, or processes, including their steps and connections.
figures: Identify any figures or illustrations within the image and extract associated captions and labels.
charts: Detect and extract data from any charts or graphs, including axis labels, legends, and data points.
logos: Identify any logos, branding, or trademarks present within the image and extract associated details.
headers: Extract header sections, including title and section titles.
footers: Extract footer content, such as page numbers, copyright text, or additional references.
annotations: Extract any annotations, comments, or marginalia in the image, especially those highlighting important notes or explanations.
lists: Identify and extract lists, whether ordered or unordered, and capture the list items.
links: Extract any URLs, hyperlinks, or references to external websites or resources.
dates: Identify and extract any dates, deadlines, or time-related information.
references: Detect and extract any bibliographic references, citations, or cross-references.
symbols: Identify and extract any symbolic representations or icons used in the document.
formulas: Extract any mathematical formulas, equations, or expressions present within the image.
labels: Identify and extract labels such as product names, specifications, or other descriptive terms.
footnotes: Extract footnotes or references to additional information or sources provided at the bottom of the page.
